events.description: Movement deep-dive companion to AI deep-dive (task-052). 10 verified findings: 3 confirm task-051's MB-1/2/3 with traces, 3 are NEW high-severity bugs the surface scan missed (SelectionSystem military filter no-op, CommandQueueSystem structural-changes-during-iteration, AIScoutingBehavior would crash if reactivated), 4 are perf/architectural. All recent flow-field/BlendRadius/cache fixes confirmed correct.
